The '''Bri'ahls''' were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] indigenous to the forested planet of [[Bri'ahl]]. They had pink skin, large eyes that lacked colored irises, squarish noses, large sharp teeth, funnel-shaped ears, and three fingers and a thumb on each hand.

{{Species-stub}}
